failedAssertions.reason: Assertion expects /api/v1/admin/audit/events and /api/v1/superadmin/audit/platform-events as surviving canonical audit surfaces, but neither exists in openapi.json or the actual codebase. The docs correctly document the real canonical audit surfaces (/api/v1/accounting/audit-trail, /api/v1/accounting/audit/transactions, /api/v1/audit/business-events, /api/v1/audit/ml-events) and explicitly note the expected routes do not exist. The assertion's expected route list is inaccurate relative to the codebase. The docs are internally consistent about what actually exists.
